methods.description: This method involves analyzing lithic artifacts at the scale of Marine Isotope Stages (MIS) to understand the influence of glacial cycling on human technological behaviors.

steps.description: Conduct analysis at the MIS scale to test hypotheses about MSA behavioral variability.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze lithic artifacts at MIS scale to test behavioral hypotheses

steps.description: Identify lithic assemblage traits associated with MIS to understand hunter-gatherer behavioral traits.
steps.searchable_summary: identify lithic traits associated with MIS

methods.description: Statistical analysis of lithic attributes to compare the three MIS and identify traits influenced by glacial cycling.

steps.description: Analyze raw material type and calculate frequencies and means for each type.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate frequencies and means of lithic attributes by raw material type

steps.description: Use contingency tables and Chi 2 or Fisher exact test for categorical traits.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Chi 2 or Fisher exact test on categorical traits

steps.description: Use correspondence analysis for multivariate traits.
steps.searchable_summary: perform correspondence analysis on multivariate traits

steps.description: Use non-parametric pairwise Wilcoxon test for numerical traits.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Wilcoxon test on numerical traits

methods.description: Examination of lithic artifacts by a team of analysts to identify significant temporal variation and maximize comparability with other assemblages.

steps.description: Analyze lithic artifacts by a team of analysts to reduce bias and increase reliability.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze lithic artifacts by multiple analysts

steps.description: Record traits and typological identifications from multiple sources.
steps.searchable_summary: record lithic traits and typologies from various sources

steps.description: Wash artifacts using an ultrasonic cleaner and soft bristle brush.
steps.searchable_summary: clean lithic artifacts with ultrasonic cleaner

steps.description: Use open source software E4 for data entry to minimize errors.
steps.searchable_summary: enter lithic data using E4 software
